info.title: Flipdish API - Payments
info.description: Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Payments operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

401.description: Authentication has been denied for this request.

403.description: Successful authentication, but authorization has been denied for this request.

AccountFieldDefinition.description: Represents the format of a bank account field

Key.description: Depending on the Key, the field's value will be stored in a different field in PayeeBankAccountData

Type.description: There are some fields that are of type known to the frontend (IBAN, Swift) -- for those frontend should use its own validation library, e.g. ibantools

Regex.description: Regex for validating the field (if specified)

AccountFieldKeyValuePair.description: Represents one populated account field (its key and value)

Key.description: Depending on the Key, the field's value will be stored in a different field in PayeeBankAccountData

AccountFieldsDefinitions.description: List of field definitions per country

DefinitionsPerCountry.description: List of field definitions per country

StoreNames.description: Store Names that are attached to this account

StoreIds.description: List of stores to attach to Account

NationalClearingCode.description: National Clearing Code (BSB in Australia, Routing Number in USA/Canada, NCC in NZ)

PopulatedAccountFields.description:
A list of one or more populated account fields (field key-value pairs).
If this list contains at least one item, the Iban, Swift and NationalClearingCode fields will be ignored.

BankAccountDetailsUpdateRequest.description: Represents a request to update bank account information details

StoreIds.description: List of stores to attach to Account

NationalClearingCode.description: National Clearing Code (BSB in Australia, Routing Number in USA/Canada, NCC in NZ)

PopulatedAccountFields.description:
A list of one or more populated account fields (field key-value pairs).
If this list contains at least one item, the Iban, Swift and NationalClearingCode fields will be ignored.

StoreNames.description: Store Names that are attached to this account

StoreIds.description: Store Ids that are attached to this account

NationalClearingCode.description: National Clearing Code (BSB in Australia, Routing Number in USA/Canada, NCC in NZ)

PopulatedAccountFields.description:
A list of one or more populated account fields (field key-value pairs).
If this list contains at least one item, the Iban, Swift and NationalClearingCode fields will be ignored.

CountryWithAccountFieldsDefinitions.description: List of field definitions per country

FlipdishError.description: Standard Flipdish API error response. Errors are returned as a JSON object with a human-readable message and a programmatic error code (see https://developers.flipdish.com/docs/error-handling).

errorCode.description: Unique identifier for programmatic error handling.

details.description: Additional context returned in non-production environments.

OnlineSalesRefundedFees.description: Fees on refunds for online sales

CashSalesRefundedFees.description: Fees on refunds for cash sales

PosSalesRefundedFees.description: Fees on refunds for POS sales

Invoice.description: Represents an ordering invoice for a period of time.

StartDay.description: The start day of the invoice period.

EndDay.description: The end day of the invoice period.

LastPaymentError.description: List's the issues with the last failed payment intent

Code.description: For some errors that could be handled programmatically, a short string indicating the error code reported.

DeclineCode.description: For card errors resulting from a card issuer decline, a short string indicating the card issuer’s reason for the decline if they provide one.

Message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error. For card errors, these messages can be shown to your users.

PaymentRefundable.description: Signifies if the payment is refundable

Description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the object. Often useful for displaying to users.

Currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code, in lowercase. Must be a supported currency.

Status.description: Status of this PaymentIntent, one of requires_payment_method, requires_confirmation, requires_action, processing, requires_capture, canceled, or succeeded. Read more about each PaymentIntent status. One of: canceled, processing, requires_action, requires_capture, requires_confirmation, requires_payment_method, or succeeded.

Created.description: Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.

Payout.description: Holds the information for a whitelabel payout.

AccountName.description: Account name of the payout destination

PeriodStartTime.description: This payout includes operations after at this date (inclusive)

PeriodEndTime.description: This payout includes operations before at this date (exclusive)

DestinationAccount.description: Last 4 digits of the destination bank IBAN

CutoffDate.description: Payouts before this date do not have a details breakdown

PosSalesRefundedAmount.description: POS Payout online sales refunded amount

CustomerCashFees.description: Payout cash fees charged to customer

PayGreenSalesAmount.description: Amount of sales through PayGreen (restaurant vouchers)

DeliveryIntegrationTipFee.description: Third party integration delivery tip fee

BankAccountHasChanged.description: Indicates whether the bank account has changed since the previous payout

PayoutChargeback.description: Holds the information for a chargeback related to a payout

OrderId.description: The id of the order the chargeback was for

PayoutId.description: The id of the payout the order is related to

OrderDate.description: The date the order was placed

ChargebackDate.description: The date the chargeback was done

PayoutDetail.description: Holds the information for a whitelabel payout with details broken down by Store

AccountName.description: Account name of the payout destination

PeriodStartTime.description: This payout includes operations after at this date (inclusive)

PeriodEndTime.description: This payout includes operations before at this date (exclusive)

DestinationAccount.description: Last 4 digits of the destination bank IBAN

PayoutStores.description: Payout information broken down by Store

CutoffDate.description: Payouts before this date do not have a details breakdown

PayoutOrder.description: Holds the information for an order related to a payout

PayoutId.description: The id of the payout the order is related to

OrderDate.description: The date the order was placed

FlatFeeExcludingVat.description: Order flat fee amount excluding VAT

FlatFeeExcludingVAT.description: Order flat fee amount excluding VAT

FlatFeeIncludingVat.description: Order flat fee amount including VAT

PayoutOtherCharge.description: Holds the information for a charge related to a payout

PayoutId.description: The id of the payout the order is related to

ChargeDate.description: The date the order was placed

PayoutRefund.description: Holds the information for a refund related to a payout

OrderId.description: The id of the order the refund was for

PayoutId.description: The id of the payout the order is related to

OrderDate.description: The date the order was placed

RefundDate.description: The date the refund was done

PayoutStore.description: Payout details for a single store

Amount.description: Amount of the payout for this Store

PayoutSummary.description: Holds the information for a whitelabel payouts summary.

PosSalesAmount.description: POS sale amount for the store

PosSalesTax.description: POS sale Tax for the store

PosSalesTips.description: POS sale tips for the store

TotalPosRevenue.description: POS Total Revenue for the store

PercentFee.description: Percent fee to customer, including VAT

FixedFee.description: Fixed fee to customer, including VAT

Errors.description: List of errors grouped by field name

RestApiFinanceSearchPaginationResult_Inv.description: Rest api finance search pagination result

RestApiFinanceSearchPaginationResult_Sub.description: Rest api finance search pagination result

PayGreenProcessingFees.description: PayGreen processing fees charged to end-user

OnlineSalesIncludingTax.description: Online sales amount plus online sales tax

OnlineSalesFeesBaseAmount.description: Online sales base amount to calculate fees

CashSalesIncludingTax.description: Cash sales amount plus online sales tax

CashSalesFeesBaseAmount.description: Online sales base amount to calculate fees

TotalSalesIncludingTax.description: Total Sales (online and cash) including tax

TotalOnlineRevenue.description: Online sales plus online delivery charges and tips

StripeAccountLinkRequest.description: Represents a request for Stripe account link creation

ReturnUrl.description: URL to be hit if link creation succeeds

Collect.description: Which information to collect from users at this stage

Type.description: Either onboarding or edit user information

StripeConnectedAccount.description: Represents a Stripe custom connected account

WhitelabelConfigId.description: Id of the WhitelabelConfig the connected account is assigned to

CardPaymentsStatus.description: Card payments capability status (Inactive, Pending, Active, Unrequested)

TransfersStatus.description: Transfers capability status (Inactive, Pending, Active, Unrequested)

StripeConnectedAccountInfo.description: Represents information about a Stripe connected account associated with a bank account

CardPaymentStatus.description: Current status of the Card Payment capability of the account

PayoutsPaused.description: Flag indicating if payouts are paused

PaymentsEnabled.description: Flag indicating if payments are enabled

StripeCustomConnectedAccount.description: Flipdish Stripe Custom Connected Account associated to the Store

CardPaymentsStatus.description: Card payments capability status (Inactive, Pending, Active, Unrequested)

TransfersStatus.description: Transfers capability status (Inactive, Pending, Active, Unrequested)

ThirdPartyFeesDetails.description: Breakdown of third party integration fees

DeliveryTipFee.description: Third party integration delivery tip fee

Errors.description: List of errors relates to field

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Implicit grant for first-party portal apps; client credentials grant for server-to-server App Store apps (exchange Client ID + Secret Key for a bearer access token).
